description: Central sector scheme to provide income support to all landholding farmers' families

fields.name: land_size_acres
fields.prompt: How many acres of agricultural land do you own?

fields.name: has_aadhaar_linked_bank
fields.prompt: Is your bank account linked to Aadhaar?

fields.name: district
fields.prompt: Which district is your land registered in?

fields.name: full_name
fields.prompt: What is your full name as per Aadhaar?

eligibility_rule: owns_land == true and land_size_acres <= 2 and has_aadhaar_linked_bank == true
